item.title: Mastering std::list in C++
item.description: The std::list container in C++ is part of the Standard Template Library (STL) and implements a doubly linked list. It allows fast insertion and deletion anywhere in the sequence, but does not allow random access like vectors. Watch on YouTube Key Characteristics Doubly linked list implementation. Elements are not stored contiguously in memory. Fast insertion and deletion at any position — O(1) if the iterator is known.
